content: We can inject an ICM-modulated spreading activation retrieval gate into RAG-based autonomous agents, where intrinsic reward from ICM dynamically boosts the activation of under-explored knowledge nodes in the retrieval corpus instead of just activating the most semantically obvious associations. This lets agents proactively retrieve underutilized, potentially novel information to solve open-ended tasks rather than being stuck in repeating dominant associative recall patterns.
source_topics: **Spreading Activation for large language model associative recall
trigger_topic: **Spreading Activation for large language model associative recall
